Also, the white strip is now at (36,47)-(39,47), which is 4x1 (vertical). And the player is at (36,44)-(39,46), which is 4x3.

- Charcoal at (24,44)-(27,47) - 4x4, still there with blue inside

- Player (N) at (36,44)-(39,46) - 4x3
- White strip (W) at (36,47)-(39,47) - 4x1 (vertical)
So the white strip is now 4x1 (vertical) at col 47, rows 36-39. And the player is at cols 44-46, rows 36-39. The white strip is to the right of the player.
Wait, but the white strip was 1x4 (horizontal) at row 36, cols 16-19. After moving RIGHT 7 times, it should be at row 36, cols 44-47. But the ascii shows the white strip at col 47, rows 36-39, which is 4x1 (vertical).

- Row 36: NNNW (cols 44-47)
- Row 37: NNNW (cols 44-47)
- Row 38: NNNW (cols 44-47)
- Row 39: NNNW (cols 44-47)
So the player (N) is at cols 44-46, rows 36-39, and the white strip (W) is at col 47, rows 36-39. The white strip is 4x1 (vertical).
But the white strip was 1x4 (horizontal) before. How did it become 4x1 (vertical)?
Oh wait, I think I understand now. The white strip is not a separate object from the player. The player is the green (N) object, and the white strip is attached to the player. When the player moves, the white strip moves with it.
Actually, looking at the segmentation, the white strip is a separate object with color W and 4 pixels. And the player is a separate object with color N and 12 pixels.
Let me reconsider. The white strip was 1x4 (horizontal) at row 36, cols 16-19. After moving RIGHT 7 times, the white strip moved to cols 44-47. But the ascii shows the white strip at col 47, rows 36-39, which is 4x1 (vertical).
Wait, maybe the white strip changed orientation when it moved. Or maybe the white strip is always attached to the right side of the player, and when the player moved, the white strip rotated.
Actually, I think the white strip is always 4 cells, and it can be either 1x4 (horizontal) or 4x1 (vertical). When the player is at rows 36-39, cols 44-46, the white strip is at col 47, rows 36-39, which is 4x1 (vertical).
So the white strip is attached to the player, and its orientation depends on the player's position or some other factor.
Now, the key question is: how do I absorb the charcoal at (24,44)-(27,47)? The player is at rows 36-39, cols 44-46, and the white strip is at col 47, rows 36-39. The charcoal is at rows 24-27, cols 44-47.
The white strip is at col 47, which is the rightmost column of the charcoal. So the white strip is to the right of the charcoal, not below it.
To absorb the charcoal, I need to move the white strip below the charcoal. The charcoal is at rows 24-27, so I need the white strip to be at row 28 (or 27), cols 44-47.
But the white strip is 4x1 (vertical) at col 47. If I move UP, the white strip would move up, but it's only 1 column wide.
Wait, let me reconsider the mechanic. In the previous absorptions, the white strip was below the charcoal. The first absorption had the white strip at row 48, cols 32-35 (1x4 horizontal), and the charcoal at rows 36-39, cols 32-35. The white strip was directly below the charcoal.
The second absorption had the white strip at rows 32-35, cols 28-31 (4x4), and the charcoal at rows 28-31, cols 28-31. The white strip was directly below the charcoal.
So the white strip needs to be directly below the charcoal for UP to work. Currently, the white strip is at col 47, rows 36-39, which is to the right of the player. The charcoal is at rows 24-27, cols 44-47.
To get the white strip below the charcoal, I need to move the player (and white strip) to be below the charcoal. The charcoal is at rows 24-27, so I need the player to be at rows 28-31 (or similar), cols 44-46.
But the player is at rows 36-39, cols 44-46. If I move UP, the player would move up. Let me try moving UP 2 times to get the player to rows 28-31.
Actually, wait. The player is at rows 36-39. If I move UP once, the player would move to rows 32-35. If I move UP again, the player would move to rows 28-31. Then the white strip would be at col 47, rows 28-31, which is to the right of the charcoal at rows 24-27, cols 44-47.
But the white strip needs to be below the charcoal, not to the right. So I need to move the player to cols 44-46, rows 28-31, and the white strip would be at col 47, rows 28-31. But the charcoal is at cols 44-47, so the white strip at col 47 would be inside the charcoal's column range.
Hmm, this is getting complicated. Let me just try moving UP and see what happens.

But the white strip needs to be below the charcoal, not to the right. So I need to move the player to cols 44-46, rows 28-31, and the white strip would be at col 47, rows 28-31. But the charcoal is at cols 44-47, so the white strip at col 47 would be inside the charcoal's column range.
Hmm, this is getting complicated. Let me just try moving UP and see what happens.
